
```{python}
# we define ref_type in the main qmd file
import yaml
import datetime
from IPython.display import display, Markdown, display_latex

from datetime import datetime, date


with open("data/teaching.yaml", "r") as file:
    data = yaml.load(file, Loader=yaml.SafeLoader)

courses = data["courses"]

# Custom sorting order
order = {
    "Spring": 0, "January": 1, "February": 2, "March": 3, "April": 4, "May": 5,
    "Summer": 6, "June": 7, "July": 8, "August": 9,
    "Fall": 10, "September": 11, "October": 12, "November": 13, "December": 14
}

def custom_sort_key(course):
    # Extract the most recent date from the terms
    dates = course.get("term", [])
    most_recent_date = max(dates) if dates else ""
    # Use the ordering from the "order" object
    month_or_season, _ = most_recent_date.split() if most_recent_date else ("", "")
    ordering = order.get(month_or_season, float('inf'))
    # Return a tuple for sorting: (ordering, most recent date, course title)
    return (ordering, most_recent_date, course["title"])

# Sorting the courses based on ordering, most recent date, and course title
sorted_courses = sorted(courses, key=custom_sort_key, reverse=True)

# define a "" for every course type: formal, short
markdown_output_short = ""
markdown_output_formal = ""


for course in sorted_courses:
    foo = ""
    terms = course.get("term", [])
    t_formatted = ", ".join(terms) # join (possibly) multiple terms into a single string
    if course.get("url") is not None:
        #foo = f"\\footnotesize {course['role']}, [{course['title']}, {course['institution']}]({course['url']})  \hfill " + f"\\footnotesize {t_formatted}  \n"
        foo = text_size_text + f"{course['role']}, [{course['title']}, {course['institution']}]({course['url']})  \hfill " + f"{t_formatted}  \n"
    else:
        #foo = f"\\footnotesize {course['role']}, {course['title']}, {course['institution']}  \hfill " + f"\\footnotesize {t_formatted}  \n"
        foo = text_size_text + f"{course['role']}, {course['title']}, {course['institution']}  \hfill " + f"{t_formatted}  \n"
    if course.get("type") == "short":
        markdown_output_short += foo
    elif course.get("type") == "formal":
        markdown_output_formal += foo

```
